devMenu.device: shake device or press m in terminal

explore.title: Explore
explore.intro: This starter app includes example code to help you get started.

routing.title: File-based routing
routing.screens: This app has two screens: src/app/index.tsx and src/app/explore.tsx
routing.layout: The layout file in src/app/_layout.tsx sets up the tab navigator.

platforms.title: Android, iOS, and web support
platforms.body: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press <bold>w</bold> in the terminal running this project.

images.title: Images
images.body: For static images, you can use the @2x and @3x suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.

themes.title: Light and dark mode components
themes.body: This template has light and dark mode support. The useColorScheme() hook lets you inspect what the user's current color scheme is, and so you can adjust UI colors accordingly.

animations.title: Animations
animations.body: This template includes an example of an animated component. The src/components/ui/collapsible.tsx component uses the powerful react-native-reanimated library to animate opening this hint.

language.title: Language & RTL
language.body: This template ships with internationalization wired up. Switch the language below — choosing a right-to-left language flips the whole layout.
